_README: Team charter registry. `tails` = dedicated charter aircraft N-numbers (e.g. DET's N313TR). `callsigns` = flight numbers for pooled charters where the airframe rotates per trip (e.g. DL8884 for NYY on Delta's VIP 757 pool, UA3782 for LAD on United's 737 MAX pool). Sources: airliners.net 2025/2026 MLB charters threads, FlyerTalk, individual X/Twitter spotter sightings, AirlineGeeks. Recheck each season — Delta's DL88xx block and United's UA37xx block shift annually. HOU uses a private Fertitta-owned 767 (N625HR) rather than a pooled Delta charter — no standard callsign. TOR: Air Canada Jetz (ACA prefix) is the charter operator despite WestJet being the marketing sponsor. ATH+TEX used New Pacific Airlines (RVF) through Nov 2025 when NPA ceased operations/filed Ch.7 — both teams need new operators confirmed for 2026. DET: Olympia Aviation LLC (ICAO: DRW) operates N313TR; exact filed flight number unconfirmed in public spotter sources.

ATH.name: Athletics
ATH.notes: New Pacific Airlines (RVF) ceased ops Nov 2025 — callsign likely stale for 2026, replacement operator unconfirmed

DET.name: Detroit Tigers
DET.notes: Olympia Aviation LLC (ICAO: DRW) — exact filed flight number unconfirmed; AeroDataBox may resolve via tail N313TR directly

HOU.name: Houston Astros
HOU.notes: Private Fertitta-owned Boeing 767-300ER; not a pooled Delta charter — no standard DAL8xxx callsign. Track via tail N625HR.

TEX.name: Texas Rangers
TEX.notes: New Pacific Airlines (RVF) ceased ops Nov 2025 — callsign likely stale for 2026, replacement operator unconfirmed

TOR.name: Toronto Blue Jays
TOR.notes: Air Canada Jetz (ACA) operates despite WestJet being marketing sponsor; A320-200 ~70 all-business-class seats
